title: Feedback That Doesn't Sting
description: 今天练习给反馈：清楚、有用，但不刺人.

items.phrase: One thing that might help is...
examples: One thing that might help is adding an example.
One thing that might help is shortening the intro.
One thing that might help is making the ask clearer.
dialogue: One thing that might help is moving the key point up.

examples: This part is working well because it's concrete.
dialogue: This part is working well. The middle just needs tightening.

examples: I wonder if we could simplify this slide.
I wonder if we could lead with the outcome.
I wonder if we could make this more specific.
dialogue: I wonder if we could split it into two.

items.phrase: The main thing I'd tweak is...
items.cn: 给出明确但不全面否定的修改意见.
examples: The main thing I'd tweak is the headline.
The main thing I'd tweak is the order.
The main thing I'd tweak is the final sentence.
dialogue: The main thing I'd tweak is the call to action.

items.cn: 适合修改文字、流程、说明.
examples: This might be clearer if we add context.
This might be clearer if we remove that paragraph.
This might be clearer if we show the before and after.
dialogue: This might be clearer if we add a quick example.
